description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.
💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.
The world's best AI personal assistant for email. Open source app to help you reach inbox zero fast.
CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
The automatic work journal. Privately turns your screen into a timeline of what you actually accomplished. Open-source and local-first.
Collabora Online is a collaborative online office suite based on LibreOffice technology. This is also the source for the Collabora Office apps for iOS and Android.
kubewall - Single-Binary Kubernetes Dashboard with Multi-Cluster Management & AI Integration. (OpenAI / Claude 4 / Gemini / DeepSeek / OpenRouter / Ollama / Qwen / LMStudio)
MacOS Niri and Hyprland inspired tiling window manager that's developer signed and notorized (safe for managed enterprise environments). Aiming for parity and extra innovation.
【Zotero AI 管家】调用大模型，自动精读论文库里的论文，总结为Zotero笔记。支持主流大模型平台！您只需像往常一样把文献丢进 Zotero， 管家会自动帮您精读论文，将文章揉碎了总结为笔记，让您“十分钟完全了解”这篇论文！
App with goals, checklists, tasks, repetitive tasks, timer, calendar, notes, shortcuts, pomodoro and 24/7 time tracking. 🙀
A modern, native, privacy-first clipboard manager for macOS.
Claude Autoresearch Skill — Autonomous goal-directed iteration for Claude Code. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch. Modify → Verify → Keep/Discard → Repeat forever.
A simple CLI tool that automates the process of backporting commits on a GitHub repo
